      • Class org.ants.javandd.TracingFactory

        class TracingFactory extends JFactory implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • _indexToSequence
            com.carrotsearch.hppc.IntIntMap _indexToSequence
            Every time a new BDD is assigned (in bdd_makenode) we track it here. This is used to disambiguate different BDDs returned by the inner factory that might have the same IDs after freeing.
          • _trace
            List<org.ants.javandd.TracingFactory.TracedOperation> _trace
            The actual trace.
          • bddproduced
            int bddproduced
